雇佣兵林天穿越玄幻世界。
开局就被欢仙宗圣女看重，将成炉鼎。
本是惨淡悲凉的一生。
林天获得了一柄与他一同升级的剑。
从此，林天变作杀神。
加入极境，成就真武大帝无上之名。
杀光一切之敌，踏上杀戮之道。
“你的剑第一次杀人，无比雀跃。”
“剑刃锋利程度加一成，你获得一年剑道领悟。”
“你经历了一场酣畅淋漓的战斗，你的剑陷入感悟之中。”
“你的剑升级为玄级灵器，获得第一本命神通：暴虐。”
…………
从此之后，一人一剑杀穿天涯。
一剑霜寒十九州。
天下万般天骄，见我也要尽低眉。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/17e3f5f8cc39cca1c0bb14edfdb77ad8","author":"欢乐小东","author_id":"","book_id":"7144627479024503847","book_name":"疯魔剑修，一柄剑镇杀万古！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303038","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6177人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":80,"name":"剑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=80&name=剑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":868,"name":"剑修","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=868&name=剑修&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7144631772414738977","read_count":"6177","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1389435"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"646","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越
